title: Oshawott Companion!
description: A mod adding in the Pokemon 'Oshawott'
body:
Welcome to the Oshawott Companion mod! This mod adds a tameable Oshawott from Pokemon™ into Minecraft!



To tame an Oshawott, you first want to find one wandering in the wild.

Walk up to it and feed it cooked salmon or cod to tame it. He is immune to all damage except player damage to stop your beloved pet from being unintentionally hurt.

 

 

He will follow you and only stay four blocks away, even if he goes for a little wander.

If he ever gets damaged, you can right-click him to pet him and heal him to max health.

 

 

 

Please note that I do not own Pokemon™, and all rights go to them.

The Forge version is coming soon! Future Pokemon™ may be added in the form of add-ons to this mod.

 

THIS IS A FAN PROJECT. ALL RIGHTS BELONG TO NINTENDO; I AM NOT AFFILIATED WITH NINTENDO OR THE POKEMON FRANCHISE.
